description.zh: 深入彼此的溝通方式與情感需求，讓理解成為連結的橋樑
description.en: Dive into each other's communication styles and emotional needs, building bridges of understanding

endMessage.zh: 真正的理解，從願意傾聽開始。謝謝你今天的坦誠。🌿
endMessage.en: True understanding begins with the willingness to listen. Thank you for your honesty today. 🌿

text.zh: 當你分享事情時，什麼反應最讓你覺得自己被聽見？
text.en: When you share something, what response helps you feel truly heard?
text.th: When you share something, what response helps you feel truly heard?
text.ja: When you share something, what response helps you feel truly heard?

text.zh: 如果我們意見不同，你通常最需要我先做什麼？
text.en: When we disagree, what do you usually need from me first?
text.th: When we disagree, what do you usually need from me first?
text.ja: When we disagree, what do you usually need from me first?

text.zh: 我哪一種溝通方式，最讓你感到舒服？
text.en: What communication style of mine feels most comfortable to you?
text.th: What communication style of mine feels most comfortable to you?
text.ja: What communication style of mine feels most comfortable to you?

text.zh: 哪一種日常關心，最會讓你覺得被照顧到？
text.en: What kind of everyday check-in makes you feel cared for?
text.th: What kind of everyday check-in makes you feel cared for?
text.ja: What kind of everyday check-in makes you feel cared for?

text.zh: 你覺得我們在哪一種情境下最容易聊得很順？
text.en: In what situation do our conversations flow most easily?
text.th: In what situation do our conversations flow most easily?
text.ja: In what situation do our conversations flow most easily?

text.zh: 當你快要被情緒淹沒時，通常會出現什麼訊號？
text.en: What signal usually appears when you are close to feeling overwhelmed?
text.th: What signal usually appears when you are close to feeling overwhelmed?
text.ja: What signal usually appears when you are close to feeling overwhelmed?

text.zh: 別人怎麼道歉，最容易讓你真的感受到修復？
text.en: What kind of apology helps you feel that repair is really happening?
text.th: What kind of apology helps you feel that repair is really happening?
text.ja: What kind of apology helps you feel that repair is really happening?

text.zh: 有沒有哪個話題，是我們其實太容易繞開不談的？
text.en: Is there a topic that we avoid too easily instead of talking through?
text.th: Is there a topic that we avoid too easily instead of talking through?
text.ja: Is there a topic that we avoid too easily instead of talking through?

text.zh: 衝突裡什麼最容易讓你突然關起來？
text.en: What tends to make you suddenly shut down during conflict?
text.th: What tends to make you suddenly shut down during conflict?
text.ja: What tends to make you suddenly shut down during conflict?

text.zh: 如果我們之間出現緊張，你希望怎麼修復能更快一些？
text.en: When tension shows up between us, how could we repair faster?
text.th: When tension shows up between us, how could we repair faster?
text.ja: When tension shows up between us, how could we repair faster?

text.zh: 今天有沒有一個你想澄清、卻一直沒說出口的誤會？
text.en: Is there a misunderstanding you want to clear up today but have not voiced yet?
text.th: Is there a misunderstanding you want to clear up today but have not voiced yet?
text.ja: Is there a misunderstanding you want to clear up today but have not voiced yet?

text.zh: 你希望我怎麼問問題，會讓你更願意真實回答？
text.en: How would you like me to ask questions so you feel safer answering honestly?
text.th: How would you like me to ask questions so you feel safer answering honestly?
text.ja: How would you like me to ask questions so you feel safer answering honestly?

text.zh: 即使和我在一起，你什麼時候仍然會感到孤單？
text.en: Even when you are with me, when do you still feel lonely?
text.th: Even when you are with me, when do you still feel lonely?
text.ja: Even when you are with me, when do you still feel lonely?

text.zh: 我們之間哪一個互動模式，最值得一起慢慢調整？
text.en: What interaction pattern between us feels most worth changing together?
text.th: What interaction pattern between us feels most worth changing together?
text.ja: What interaction pattern between us feels most worth changing together?

text.zh: 如果現在要有一場能讓我們更理解彼此的對話，你最想聊什麼？
text.en: If we could have one conversation that deepens understanding right now, what would it be about?
text.th: If we could have one conversation that deepens understanding right now, what would it be about?
text.ja: If we could have one conversation that deepens understanding right now, what would it be about?

text.zh: 哪一種語氣或句子，最容易讓你在親密話題裡打開自己？
text.en: What tone or wording helps you open up when the topic becomes intimate?
text.th: What tone or wording helps you open up when the topic becomes intimate?
text.ja: What tone or wording helps you open up when the topic becomes intimate?

text.zh: 當你對我們感到不安時，什麼樣的安撫最能同時安定你的身體與心？
text.en: When you feel insecure about us, what reassurance calms both your body and mind?
text.th: When you feel insecure about us, what reassurance calms both your body and mind?
text.ja: When you feel insecure about us, what reassurance calms both your body and mind?

text.zh: 有沒有一個很難開口的需求，你其實一直希望能被我理解？
text.en: Is there a difficult need you have hoped I would understand, even though it is hard to ask for?
text.th: Is there a difficult need you have hoped I would understand, even though it is hard to ask for?
text.ja: Is there a difficult need you have hoped I would understand, even though it is hard to ask for?

text.zh: 我們曾在哪一刻，不用太多話就感受到很深的親密？
text.en: When have we communicated deep intimacy without needing many words?
text.th: When have we communicated deep intimacy without needing many words?
text.ja: When have we communicated deep intimacy without needing many words?

text.zh: 你希望我們怎麼談論渴望，才會更安全、更自在？
text.en: How would you like us to talk about desire so it feels safer and more comfortable?
text.th: How would you like us to talk about desire so it feels safer and more comfortable?
text.ja: How would you like us to talk about desire so it feels safer and more comfortable?
